zh.lifeSummary: 當Maxwell Houghton於1511年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Richard Houghton15歲，母親Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton29歲。他於1530年與Margaret Elliot在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1570年1月16日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maxwell Houghton于1511年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Richard Houghton15岁，母亲Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton29岁。他于1530年与Margaret Elliot在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1570年1月16日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the Scottish surname, in origin a local name from a minor place on the River Tweed, named as ‘the stream (Old English well(a)) of Mack’. The latter is a form of Magnus . Maxwell was the middle name of the newspaper tycoon William Maxwell Aitken , Lord Beaverbrook ( 1879–1964 ), who was born in Canada, and it has been used as a given name among his descendants. It is now also frequently taken as an expansion of Max .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Maxwell Houghton was born in 1511, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Houghton, was 15 and his mother, Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton, was 29. He married Margaret Elliot in 1530, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 16 January 1570, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 59.

ko.lifeSummary: Maxwell Houghton(이)가 1511년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Houghton(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Margaret Elliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1570년 1월 16일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maxwell Houghton родился в 1511 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Houghton было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Ashton Hoghton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Elliot в 1530 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1570 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
